mapper.select: SELECT ID, BO_HAI_TONG_ID, BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID, SCN, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, IS_WATER, IS_SHORE_POWER, REQ_WATER, REQ_ELECTRICITY, BOW_DRAFT, STERN_DRAFT, IS_TUG, TUG_NUMBER, PILOTAGE, IS_PAYMENT, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, IS_DANGEROUS, ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, BERTH_TIME, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, BERTH_TYPE, BOLLARD_NO_START, BOLLARD_NO_END, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, RECEIVE_BY, RECEIVE_BY_NAME, RECEIVE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DEL_REMARK, DEL_BY, DEL_BY_NAME, DEL_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, START_PORT_ID, START_PORT_NAME, END_PORT_ID, END_PORT_NAME, PRE_PORT_ID, PRE_PORT_NAME, NEXT_PORT_ID, NEXT_PORT_NAME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT DISTINCT TDS.ID, TDS.TRADE_TYPE, TDS.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDS.BO_HAI_TONG_SHIP_ID, TDS.SCN, TDS.SHIP_ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME, TDS.IMP_EXP, TDS.TRADE_TYPE, TDS.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDS.IS_WATER, TDS.IS_SHORE_POWER, TDS.REQ_WATER, TDS.REQ_ELECTRICITY, TDS.BOW_DRAFT, TDS.STERN_DRAFT, TDS.IS_TUG, TDS.TUG_NUMBER, TDS.PILOTAGE, TDS.IS_PAYMENT, TDS.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDS.IS_DANGEROUS, TDS.ARRIVAL_TIME_PLAN, TDS.LEAVE_PORT_TIME_PLAN, TDS.ARRIVAL_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.LEAVE_ANCHORAGE_TIME, TDS.BERTH_TIME, TDS.BERTH_ID, TDS.BERTH_NAME, TDS.BERTH_TYPE, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_START, TDS.BOLLARD_NO_END, TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME, TDS.RECEIVE_BY, TDS.RECEIVE_BY_NAME, TDS.RECEIVE_TIME, TDS.DEL_FLAG, TDS.DEL_REMARK, TDS.DEL_BY, TDS.DEL_BY_NAME, TDS.DEL_TIME, TDS.REMARK, TDS.CREATE_BY, TDS.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDS.CREATE_TIME, TDS.UPDATE_BY, TDS.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDS.UPDATE_TIME, TDS.START_PORT_ID, TDS.START_PORT_NAME, TDS.END_PORT_ID, TDS.END_PORT_NAME, TDS.PRE_PORT_ID, TDS.PRE_PORT_NAME, TDS.NEXT_PORT_ID, TDS.NEXT_PORT_NAME, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDS.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, MS.NET_WEIGHT FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TDS.ID = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID left join M_SHIP MS on TDS.SHIP_ID = MS.ID WHERE TDSI.ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, IMP_EXP, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, VOYAGE, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, CONTACTS, SHIP_PHONE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHIP_STATUS_CODE, SHIP_STATUS_NAME, WORK_START_TIME, WORK_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT T1.ID, T1.DYNAMIC_START_TIME, T1.STOP_NAME, T1.STOP_TYPE_NAME, M1.STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC T1 LEFT JOIN M_STOP_REASON M1 ON M1.ID = T1.STOP_ID LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA d ON M1.STOP_REASON_CLASS_CODE=d.DICT_VALUE AND d.DICT_TYPE='STOP_REASON_CLASS' LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA e ON M1.STOP_REASON_TYPE_CODE=e.DICT_VALUE AND e.DICT_TYPE='STOP_REASON_TYPE' WHERE T1.DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE IN ( '80', '90' ) AND T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY T1.CREATE_TIME

SELECT TBR.ID, TBR.ID AS RATE_ID, TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, TBR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, TBR.PROCESS_CODE, TBR.PROCESS_NAME, TBR.CARGO_CODE, TBR.CARGO_NAME, TBR.INTE_FORE, TBR.RATE, TBR.TAX_RATE, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1, MDD_UNIT.DICT_LABEL MEASUREMENT_UNIT_NAME1, TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE2, TBR.STATUS, TBR.START_DATE, TBR.END_DATE, TBR.REMARK, TBR.CREATE_BY, TBR.CREATE_BY_NAME, TBR.CREATE_TIME, TBR.UPDATE_BY, TBR.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TBR.UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS JOIN T_BUS_RATE TBR ON (TDS.TRADE_TYPE = TBR.INTE_FORE AND TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME >= TBR.START_DATE AND TDS.LEAVE_BERTH_TIME <= TBR.END_DATE) JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD_UNIT ON (MDD_UNIT.DICT_TYPE = 'UNIT' AND TBR.MEASUREMENT_UNIT_CODE1 = MDD_UNIT.DICT_VALUE) WHERE TBR.STATUS = '10' AND TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE IN ('BO00100', 'BO00101','MS00260','MS00261') AND TDS.ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TYPE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_ID, "NUMBER", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, RATE_ID, NUMBER2 FROM T_COST_SHIP WHERE TYPE = '10' AND SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TYPE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_ID, "NUMBER", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, RATE_ID, NUMBER2 FROM T_COST_SHIP WHERE SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND TYPE = '10'
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_COST_SHIP(ID, TYPE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_ID, "NUMBER", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME,RATE_ID,NUMBER2 ) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.number, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.number2, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT ALL
INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BUSINESS_ID,RATE_ID,NUMBER2) VALUES (#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.number2, jdbcType=DECIMAL})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_COST_SHIP WHERE TYPE = '10' AND SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL, STATEMENT_BY_NAME, REVIEW_BY_NAME, REVIEW_TIME FROM T_COST_STATEMENT WHERE TYPE = '30' AND SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ID IN ( SELECT TCSD.STATEMENT FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD INNER JOIN T_COST_SHIP TCS ON TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = TCS.ID WHERE TCS.TYPE = '10' AND TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

select E.DICT_LABEL AS "shipKindName" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS LEFT JOIN M_SHIP MS ON TDS.SHIP_ID = MS.ID left join M_DICT_DATA E ON MS.SHIP_KIND_CODE=e.DICT_VALUE and E.DICT_TYPE='SHIP_KIND' where TDS.ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID,STATUS FROM T_COST_SHIP TCS WHERE TCS."TYPE" = '10' AND TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID,STATUS FROM T_COST_STATEMENT WHERE ID IN ( SELECT TCSD.STATEMENT FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD INNER JOIN T_COST_SHIP TCS ON TCSD.BUSINESS_ID = TCS.ID WHERE TCS.TYPE = '10' AND TCS.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

SELECT ID, TYPE, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_ID, "NUMBER", RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, RATE, TAX_RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, RATE_ID, NUMBER2 FROM T_COST_SHIP WHERE TYPE = '20' AND SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select a.ID, a.RATE_ITEM_CODE, a.RATE_NAME as rateItemName, a.RATE, a.TAX_RATE, a.RATE_ID, a.VOYAGE_ID, a.SHIP_VOYAGE, a.BILL_QUANTITY as "number", a.BILL_QUANTITY2 as "number2", a.AMOUNT_MONEY as "amount", a.TAX_AMOUNT, a.CREATE_BY, a.CREATE_BY_NAME,a.CREATE_TIME,a.UPDATE_BY,a.UPDATE_TIME,a.UPDATE_BY_NAME, a.STATUS, a.company_id, a.company_name, a.STATEMENT_ID, a.UNIT_CODE, a.UNIT_NAME, a.REMARK from T_MISC_BILLING a LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON to_char(MFI.ITEM_CD) = TO_CHAR(a.RATE_ITEM_CODE)
MFI.ITEM_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('2') AND a.VOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TDSD.ID,TCSI.IMP_EXP SHIP_STATUS_CODE,TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ID,TDSD.DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE,TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID,TDSD.DYNAMIC_START_TIME FROM T_COST_SHIPVOYAGE TCS LEFT JOIN T_COST_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TCSI ON TCS.ID = TCSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC TDSD ON TCSI.ID = TDSD.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE IN (110,100,50) AND TCS.ID =#{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY DYNAMIC_START_TIME

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, DYNAMIC_START_TIME, DYNAMIC_END_TIME FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC WHERE DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE = '130' AND SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY DYNAMIC_START_TIME

select distinct TCSHIP.AMOUNT, TCSHIP.RATE_ITEM_NAME FEE_ITEM, TCSHIP."NUMBER" special_Number
from T_COST_SHIP TCSHIP where TCSHIP.RATE_ITEM_CODE IN ('MS00260','MS00261') and TCSHIP.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId} and TCSHIP.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId}

select ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, DYNAMIC_START_TIME from T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC where SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE in ('50','110')
and DYNAMIC_START_TIME <=( select nvl(max(DYNAMIC_START_TIME),to_date('1997-01-01','yyyy-MM-dd')) from T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC where SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID != #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND SHIPVOYAGE_ID =#{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE = 50 )
and DYNAMIC_START_TIME >=( select nvl(max(DYNAMIC_START_TIME),to_date('1997-01-01','yyyy-MM-dd')) from T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC where SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID != #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND SHIPVOYAGE_ID =#{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and DYNAMIC_TYPE_CODE = 50 )
and DYNAMIC_START_TIME < to_date('1997-01-01','yyyy-MM-dd')
ORDER BY DYNAMIC_START_TIME
